responsibilities: Design and prototyping to optimize User Experience (UX).
Development of modern and reusable UI components.
Bug fixing and responsive performance optimization.
Development of proprietary CMS for real-time content management.
Implementation of role and security architecture with JWT.
Integration of payment gateways (Mercado Pago) and LinkedIn API.
Leadership and mentoring of intern developers.
Comprehensive redesign of the platform using the MERN stack.
Creation of a real-time reservation engine and administrative panel.
Stripe integration for payments and PDF billing system.

personalInfo.name: Mario Gomariz
personalInfo.description: Specialized in React and Next.js, focusing on UX/UI to design intuitive and attractive interfaces. I enjoy keeping up with new trends and enriching the user experience.

projects.title: SinergiaRH-Digital
projects.summary: Freelance work: Web platform for human resources management and digital recruiting.
description: SinergiaRH-Digital is a comprehensive platform developed to streamline talent recruitment and optimize HR management. This project was a remunerated freelance job, covering the operational needs of the client company.
Developed with React, Tailwind CSS, Express, and MySQL, highlighted by:
• Authentication and authorization system with secure role and access management.
• Administration panel (CRUD) to manage all profiles, vacancies, and web content.
• Complete and seamless integration of online payments with MercadoPago.

projects.title: Fairway Indoor Golf
projects.summary: Freelance work: E-commerce application with a reservation system for an indoor golf center.
description: Fairway Indoor Golf is a web application focused on customer conversion and simulator reservations for an indoor golf facility. Developed as remunerated freelance work.
Developed with React, Tailwind CSS, Express, and MySQL, integrating vital business functions:
• Real-time shift booking system with validation and overlap prevention.
• Secure authentication portal for customers to register and view their histories.
• Stripe API integration for seamless and secure credit card payments processing.

projects.title: Regional Assembly
projects.summary: Full-Stack Project: Cross-platform mobile app and scalable API for assembly management, control, and accreditation.
description: Comprehensive ecosystem composed of a native mobile app and a robust backend, custom-designed to streamline registration and optimize the administration of regional assemblies.
Developed from start to finish using TypeScript in both the client (React Native / Expo) and server (NestJS), featuring:
• Native mobile interface equipped with hardware utilities, integrating fast QR code scanning, dynamic credential generation, and agile state management via Zustand.
• Solidly structured and scalable backend architecture under NestJS, efficiently connected to a PostgreSQL relational database operated with TypeORM.

• Security and automation through a login system with JWT and Passport, synchronization with Google Cloud services (Storage and Pub/Sub) for file management, and an email delivery engine (Nodemailer).

projects.title: Chat App
projects.summary: Personal project: Real-time cross-server asynchronous chat software supported by Next.js and In-Memory Storage.
description: Full-Stack platform supplying truly bidirectional real-time messaging and persistence. Approached as a personal project to squeeze Next.js alongside the Colyseus WebSocket server engine.
Provides an agile cross-communication ecosystem and an elaborate visual layer with functional patterns (TailwindCSS - Glassmorphism).
• Optimized subscription of variables and non-blocking interfaces using the global state manager Zustand.
• Temporary caching of messages natively injected into the In-Memory storage of backend rooms.
• Silent Auth mechanism that prevents recurrent logins, with interconnected automatic alerts via Telegram.

projects.title: Todo List
projects.summary: Personal project: Interactive and responsive Kanban application with advanced local persistence.
description: A productivity web app inspired by the Kanban format. Built with React, Vite, and optimized with TailwindCSS as a highly polished personal project.
Highlighted features include:
• Interactive task management through column states (Drag/Click).
• Ultra-fast data persistence using LocalStorage, without relying on an external backend.
• Export engine allowing sharing of boards and notes via URL links (URLSearchParams).

projects.title: Ruta Control
projects.summary: Full-Stack Project: Comprehensive system for administrative fleet management, trip control, and transportation logistics.
description: Full-Stack platform oriented towards the administration and monitoring of logistical operations, custom-designed to optimize fleet and transportation flows.
Scalable and robust architecture managed end-to-end with TypeScript's strict typing, integrating React on the client and Node.js (Express) on the server.

• Centralized fleet management: detailed administration of drivers, tractors, and semi-trailers, automatically monitoring statuses, license expirations, and certifications (RTO, hydraulic tests, etc.).
• Trip planning and tracking: efficient assignment of units, scope control (national/international), and chronological logging of stops with odometer traceability.
• Backend architecture and relational persistence structured via Prisma ORM over PostgreSQL, backed by a secure role-based JWT authentication system.
• Interactive statistics and charts dashboard, with dynamic filtering by modules (drivers, tractors, semi-trailers, services) and advanced PDF report export functionality.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.summary: Personal project: Weather application with complex caching optimizations implementing SOLID principles.
description: Professional solution for weather forecasting, guided by Clean Architecture and SOLID pillars. Developed as a personal project with React and TypeScript's strong typing.
Provides an extremely robust and comprehensive user experience thanks to:
• Search system with Debouncing to drastically care for latent jumps in network requests.
• Direct location measurement and synchronization thanks to the native Geolocation tool.
• Parallel revalidation and smart automatic storage thanks to deep integration with TanStack Query.

projects.title: Shopping Cart
projects.summary: Personal project: Interactive SPA e-commerce platform built natively with Vanilla JS, HTML, and CSS.
description: Fully dynamic e-commerce simulator created as a personal project to certify my skills on pure DOM manipulations without external abstractions.
Developed using entirely native technologies (HTML5, Modern CSS, Vanilla JS), achieving performance advantages and features such as:
• Dynamic catalog with category filtering algorithms and live textural searches.
• Reactive cart state management calculating subtotals, deletions, and counts instantly.
• Truly responsive architecture molded from scratch with Media Queries, Flexbox, and CSS Grid.

softSkills.title: Teamwork
paragraphs: I adapt to any team, contributing ideas, energy, and communication to achieve collective results. I enjoy collaborating, sharing knowledge, and empowering group work.

softSkills.title: Adaptability
paragraphs: I easily adjust to new technologies, teams, and ways of working. I do not fear changes: I see them as opportunities to grow and add value.

softSkills.title: Continuous Learning
paragraphs: I am always looking to learn something new and apply it to my projects. I am motivated by investigating, training myself, and staying up to date to bring fresh ideas and innovative solutions.

softSkills.title: Problem Solving
paragraphs: I like to analyze challenges and find creative and quick solutions to any obstacle. I enjoy solving technical problems and helping others overcome theirs.
